## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1)

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 97.3%, very close to the 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 96.8%. All airports except Katowice-Pyrzowice (93.8%) were above 95.0%.

With regard to the 2.7% of flights that did not adhere, 1.6% were early and 1.1% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
